name: The Ember
flavor: A dying fire spirit. Where it burns, corruption spreads — but so does destruction. Ember trades board health for raw power.

passives.name: Scorching Path
passives.flavor: Where the Ember walks, the land scorches. Every foothold is a wound in the world.
passives.description: At Tide start, each territory with Ember presence gains 1 Corruption and all invaders there take 1 damage.

passives.name: Nothing Burns Forever
passives.flavor: Every flame consumes itself in the end. There is no coming back from the Ember's fire.
passives.description: Playing a bottom removes the card permanently (no Dormancy). Ember's bottoms are always one-shot.

passives.name: Scorched Earth
passives.flavor: When the smoke clears, nothing remains. The invaders who survived the fire will face the ash.
passives.description: At Resolution, deal damage to all invaders equal to total corruption across presence territories. Then halve that corruption (round down).

passives.name: Rising Fury
passives.flavor: The more the land burns, the stronger the Ember becomes. Corruption is not a weakness — it is power.
passives.description: All Ember card damage effects get +1 per territory at corruption Level 1+ (Tainted or worse).

passives.name: Heat Wave
passives.flavor: Rest brings not peace, but a surge of searing heat. The invaders never see it coming.
passives.description: On Rest, deal 2 damage to all invaders in ALL presence territories.

passives.name: Controlled Burn
passives.flavor: The spirit reads the flames like a language. Where fires are tended, fear takes root.
passives.description: At Tide start, if 3+ territories are at Corruption Level 1, generate 2 Fear.

passives.name: Phoenix Spark
passives.flavor: Even in death, the Ember's fire frightens. A card destroyed is a flame passed on.
passives.description: When a card is permanently removed (bottom or rest-dissolve), generate 3 Fear.

cards.name: Flame Burst

top.desc: Deal 2 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 1

bottom.desc: Deal 6 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 1

cards.design_note: Core damage card. Double Ash — Ash T1 (Ember Fury) reachable in one play.

cards.name: Kindle

bottom.desc: Place 1 Presence anywhere in range 3, then deal 2 damage to all invaders in that territory

cards.design_note: Presence placement + seeding damage. Bottom's range 3 = anywhere on board.

cards.name: Burning Ground

top.desc: Deal 2 damage to all invaders in any territory

bottom.desc: Deal 4 damage to all invaders in any territory, then generate 3 Fear

cards.design_note: Range 0 = anywhere. Ash+Shadow hits both Ash and Shadow thresholds.

cards.name: Smoke Screen
cards.design_note: Pure fear card. Shadow+Gale opens cross-element thresholds.

cards.name: Stoke the Fire

top.desc: Reduce Corruption by 2 points in range 1

bottom.desc: Reduce Corruption by 4 points in range 1, then deal 2 damage to all invaders there

cards.design_note: Corruption management. Ember needs this to avoid Level 2 lockout. Double Ash fuels threshold.

cards.name: Ember Spread

bottom.desc: Place 2 Presence in range 2 (can split across territories)

cards.design_note: Presence expansion. Ash Trail needs presence to deal damage — every token matters.

cards.name: Heat Shimmer
cards.design_note: Weave recovery. Ember burns through weave fast with Ash Trail — this is essential sustain.

cards.name: Conflagration

top.desc: Deal 2 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 1

bottom.desc: Deal 5 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 2. Slow all invaders in that territory.

cards.design_note: Starter heavy hitter. Triple element on bottom = 6 threshold points. Slow combo bonus.

cards.name: Ash Veil
cards.design_note: DRAFT. Fear engine. Shadow cross-threshold synergy.

cards.name: Cinder Presence

bottom.desc: Place 1 Presence in range 2, then deal 3 damage to all invaders in that territory

cards.design_note: DRAFT. Presence placement with attached damage. Feeds Ash Trail footprint.

cards.name: Fan the Flames

top.desc: Deal 3 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 1

bottom.desc: Deal 6 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 1

cards.design_note: DRAFT. Second copy of core damage. Double Ash = fast threshold stacking.

cards.name: Purifying Fire

top.desc: Reduce Corruption by 3 points in range 1

bottom.desc: Remove one full Corruption level from one territory in range 1

cards.design_note: DRAFT. Ember's ONLY Purify. Rare and precious — saves from Desecration spiral.

cards.name: Smoldering Ruins

bottom.desc: Restore 3 Weave, then reduce Corruption by 3 points anywhere

cards.design_note: DRAFT. Utility sustain — weave + board-wide cleanse.

cards.name: Fire Storm

top.desc: Deal 4 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 2

bottom.desc: Deal 7 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 2, then deal 3 damage to all invaders in an adjacent territory

cards.design_note: DRAFT. Awakened multi-territory damage. Triple-element = 6 on bottom.

cards.name: Blazing Advance

bottom.desc: Place 1 Presence in range 2, then deal 5 damage to all invaders in that territory

cards.design_note: DRAFT. Awakened presence + damage combo. New territory = Ash Trail target + immediate damage.

cards.name: Flashpoint

bottom.desc: Deal 7 damage to all invaders in range 1, then generate 3 Fear

cards.design_note: DRAFT. Awakened fear+damage hybrid. Bottom is devastating with Ember Fury bonus.

cards.name: Wildfire

top.desc: Deal 4 damage to all invaders in range 1. Generate 1 Fear per invader killed.

bottom.desc: Deal 4 damage to all invaders in EVERY territory with Ember presence. Triple Ash: generate 6 Fear.

cards.design_note: Ancient board-wipe. Bottom is build-defining — rewards max presence footprint.

cards.name: Last Conflagration

bottom.desc: Deal 10 damage to all invaders in any territory, then generate 5 Fear

cards.design_note: Ancient finisher. 10+fury bonus can one-shot any invader cluster. With Phoenix Spark, even playing this generates 3 Fear.
